title: Invigorating Peruvian Muffins Tiradito
description: Crispy, citrus-topped muffins that mimic the fresh, sliced feel of a tiradito, perfect for a post-party hangover cure.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180C and line a 12-cup muffin tin with parchment liners.
Whisk almond flour, coconut flour, baking powder, and sea salt in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, beat eggs, melted coconut oil, lime juice, and maple syrup until smooth.
Combine wet and dry mixtures, stirring until just combined; fold in cilantro and sliced chili.
Spoon batter evenly into muffin cups, filling each about 3/4 full.
Bake for 18 minutes until the tops are golden and a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Remove from oven and let cool on a rack for 5 minutes.
While cool, drizzle a thin line of infused coconut oil around the top of each muffin to mimic a tiradito sauce.
Slice each muffin slightly from the top and spread the oil drizzle to reveal a layered, zesty interior.
Serve warm, optionally dusted with extra cilantro, as a refreshing hangover cure.
